---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, workbook panel, analytic rule, or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Concrete, actionable description. If it's a Sentinel artifact, include proposed KQL / workbook layout. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you consider? Why is this approach better? -->

## Scope

- [ ] Auth module change
- [ ] New telemetry stream (use `new_stream_request` template instead)
- [ ] New workbook
- [ ] New analytic rule
- [ ] New hunting query
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, references, related issues. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues + the roadmap for duplicates
- [ ] I am willing to submit a PR (optional)
